beg.desc: MATLAB is matrix-focused. Every variable is an array by default.

int.desc: Solve linear equations dynamically using matrix division techniques.

pro.desc: Filter array coordinates using logical indexing operations.

beg.desc: Create loops to iterate through matrix values.

int.desc: Construct custom reusable routines by defining functions.

pro.desc: Speed up matrix operations using vectorized calculations instead of loops.
pro.code:
x = 1:1000;
y = sin(x); % vectorized - runs instantly
